task-1773274157988-afxlca.description: Research and compile a comprehensive skill map for RevOps professionals using Claude Code. Cover: (1) Core RevOps workflows automatable via Claude Code — CRM hygiene, pipeline reporting, forecasting, attribution modeling; (2) Key HubSpot API interactions — contacts, deals, workflows, custom objects; (3) n8n + Claude Code integration patterns for GTM automation; (4) Recommended Claude Code slash commands and project prompts tailored to RevOps; (5) Data tools — SQL, dbt, Metabase, Hex that pair well with Claude Code; (6) Skill gaps and learning paths for a RevOps architect moving into agentic workflows. Deliver a structured skills framework with proficiency tiers (foundational / practitioner / advanced).
